title: apluda distachya
intro: Apluda distachya, also known as the joint grass or jointed grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Indian medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Apluda distachya include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, relieve joint pain, and protect against oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for consumption, or used topically in the form of oils or ointments for localized application.
